title: Golden Extravaganza: York High’s 50-year musical legacy
description: GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - York High School...
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - York High School celebrates 50 years of musical memories with its Golden Extravaganza, featuring six spectacular shows from 19 to 28 August at the school. Directed by Principal Francois Moll (musical director) and Linda Johnson (show director from York Dance Department), the performances weave a vibrant tapestry of musicals, dramas, dance, cabarets, and rock concerts from York’s history.


> The Golden Extravaganza brings together the most iconic moments from York's past productions over the last 25 years.


"This is more than just a show; it's a heartfelt tribute to the leagacy we've built and the memories we've made," says Moll.

As conductor of the band, Moll's musical team includes Christopher Petrie (piano), Elrine-Louise Lottino (keyboard), Nellie Brandt (flute), Renaldo Hendricks (Bass guitar), Travis Wurdeman (electric guitar) and Eric Vallieres (drums).

PHOTO GALERY: York High School’s 50th anniversary Golden Extravaganza

The rest of the team includes Darelle de Lange (assistant director), Monya van Heerden (stage manager and props master), Janine Paton (costumes, hair, make-up) and technical director Bonny Baloyi with lighting and sound specialists Sevi Botha and Marius Els. Standard Bank is the main sponsor of the event.

Tatum Windvogel and Keagan Owen in Jolly Holiday (Mary Poppins, 2013)


> Show dates and times:


- 19 August (18:30) gala evening
- 20 August (15:00) matinee
- 21, 26, 27 and 28 August (18:30)

Purchase tickets for R100 (adults) and R80 (children under 6) at the school during school hours and join the celebration! For information contact 044 874 2333.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
